who: restaurant back office managers processing 5–15 inventory reports/month
offer: For restaurant back office managers processing 5–15 inventory reports/month, inaccurate inventory tracking causes overstocking and wastage. We provide daily inventory usage reports instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory tracking leads to overstocking and wastage.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant back office managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on inventory workflows
DM outreach to restaurant back office managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for inventory management tools
try_it: Let users try daily report generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
